  "findings": [
    "Condensate drain line missing required trap",
    "Condensate drain line improperly sloped, risking backflow and blockage"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install a proper condensate trap per manufacturer instructions and IRC M1801",
    "Correct drain line slope to minimum 1/4 inch per foot toward approved disposal point"
  ],
  "rationale": "A condensing furnace requires a trap in the condensate drain to prevent flue gas leakage and ensure proper drainage. Improper slope can cause water accumulation, leading to furnace shutdown, water damage, or unsafe operation. This violates IRC M1801 and NFPA 54 venting and drainage requirements.",
  "references": [
    "IRC M1801.3",
    "IRC M1801.8",
    "NFPA 54 Section 12.9"
  ]
}
